description: Delete a single project given a company ID and project ID. When a Project has been successfully deleted, you will receive the Project's ID back as confirmation.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema containing a unique identifier.
